sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n109770" key="u)u/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὐύζω</orth>, <sense id="n109770.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">make the sound</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">υ <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">υ</itype>,</foreign> of owls, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.l. for</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἰύζω</ref> </xr> in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:5:90" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.90</biblScope> </bibl> (fort. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὑὕζω</foreign>).</sense> </entryFree>
